'''gongataka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:atelostomate|atelostomate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-ng-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:atelostomate|atelostomate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| gongataka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gongatithi|gongatithi]] || [[word:gongatiji|gongatiji]] || [[word:gongatishi|gongatishi]] || [[word:gongatiki|gongatiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gongatuthuthu|gongatuthuthu]] || [[word:gongatujuju|gongatujuju]] || [[word:gongatushushu|gongatushushu]] || [[word:gongatukuku|gongatukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gongatuthu|gongatuthu]] || [[word:gongatuju|gongatuju]] || [[word:gongatushu|gongatushu]] || [[word:gongatuku|gongatuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gongatufthuf|gongatufthuf]] || [[word:gongatufjuf|gongatufjuf]] || [[word:gongatufshuf|gongatufshuf]] || [[word:gongatufkuf|gongatufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gongatethe|gongatethe]] || [[word:gongateje|gongateje]] || [[word:gongateshe|gongateshe]] || [[word:gongateke|gongateke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gongatothotho|gongatothotho]] || [[word:gongatojojo|gongatojojo]] || [[word:gongatoshosho|gongatoshosho]] || [[word:gongatokoko|gongatokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gongatotho|gongatotho]] || [[word:gongatojo|gongatojo]] || [[word:gongatosho|gongatosho]] || [[word:gongatoko|gongatoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gongatofthof|gongatofthof]] || [[word:gongatofjof|gongatofjof]] || [[word:gongatofshof|gongatofshof]] || [[word:gongatofkof|gongatofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:gongatĂŻfthĂŻf|gongatĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:gongatĂŻfjĂŻf|gongatĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:gongatĂŻfshĂŻf|gongatĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:gongatĂŻfkĂŻf|gongatĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:gongatĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|gongatĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:gongatĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|gongatĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:gongatĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|gongatĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:gongatĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|gongatĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:gongatĂŻfthĂŻf|gongatĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:gongatĂŻfjĂŻf|gongatĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:gongatĂŻfshĂŻf|gongatĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:gongatĂŻfkĂŻf|gongatĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:gongatĂŻfthĂŻf|gongatĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:gongatĂŻfjĂŻf|gongatĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:gongatĂŻfshĂŻf|gongatĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:gongatĂŻfkĂŻf|gongatĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gongatĂŠthĂŠ|gongatĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:gongatĂŠjĂŠ|gongatĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:gongatĂŠshĂŠ|gongatĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:gongatĂŠkĂŠ|gongatĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gongatathatha|gongatathatha]] || [[word:gongatajaja|gongatajaja]] || [[word:gongatashasha|gongatashasha]] || [[word:gongatakaka|gongatakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gongatatha|gongatatha]] || [[word:gongataja|gongataja]] || [[word:gongatasha|gongatasha]] || [[word:gongataka|gongataka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gongatafthaf|gongatafthaf]] || [[word:gongatafjaf|gongatafjaf]] || [[word:gongatafshaf|gongatafshaf]] || [[word:gongatafkaf|gongatafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:gongatasha|gongatasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:gongatshĂ«asha|gongatshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongatroasha|gongatroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gongatmuasha|gongatmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:gongatyaasha|gongatyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogongatnkshĂ«asha|gogongatnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogongatnkroasha|gogongatnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogongatnkmuasha|gogongatnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogongatnkyaasha|gogongatnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:gongangatasha|gongangatasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gongangatshĂ«asha|gongangatshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongangatroasha|gongangatroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gongangatmuasha|gongangatmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gongangatyaasha|gongangatyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogongangatnkshĂ«asha|gogongangatnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogongangatnkroasha|gogongangatnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogongangatnkmuasha|gogongangatnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogongangatnkyaasha|gogongangatnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:gengĂŠtasha|gengĂŠtasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gengĂŠtshĂ«asha|gengĂŠtshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gengĂŠtroasha|gengĂŠtroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gengĂŠtmuasha|gengĂŠtmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gengĂŠtyaasha|gengĂŠtyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogengĂŠtnkshĂ«asha|gogengĂŠtnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogengĂŠtnkroasha|gogengĂŠtnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogengĂŠtnkmuasha|gogengĂŠtnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogengĂŠtnkyaasha|gogengĂŠtnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:gongfatasha|gongfatasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gongfatshĂ«asha|gongfatshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongfatroasha|gongfatroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gongfatmuasha|gongfatmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gongfatyaasha|gongfatyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogongfatnkshĂ«asha|gogongfatnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogongfatnkroasha|gogongfatnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogongfatnkmuasha|gogongfatnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogongfatnkyaasha|gogongfatnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|17228b0}}
